name: White Bean Chard & Pancetta Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place pancetta in an oven-proof pot over medium heat and cook, stirring occasionally, for 2 minutes.
3. Add onion, carrot, celery, and garlic; continue cooking, stirring occasionally, another 7 minutes, or until vegetables soften.
4. Add beans, broth, and thyme. Cover tightly and place in oven.
5. Bake for 1 1/2 hours or until beans are soft.
6. Remove the center stem from Swiss chard leaves; slice into crosswise slices about 1/4-inch thick. Roughly chop the chard leaves.
7. Add chopped chard to bean mixture and return to oven.
8. If soup is too thick, add some water. Cook another 20 minutes.
9. Remove pot from oven and season with salt and pepper as needed.
10. Serve soup hot, offering grated Parmesan cheese on the side.
